description: Monitoring systems alert that the primary database server is experiencing sustained high CPU usage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes ownership of the alert.

nodes.task_description: Access the database monitoring tool to identify the queries consuming the most CPU.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a single, inefficient query from a new reporting feature is causing the high load.

nodes.task_description: Escalate the issue to the engineering team responsible for the reporting feature, providing the problematic query.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a high-priority ticket with actionable data for the developers.
